title: veronica cymbalariifolia var. longipes
intro: Veronica cymbalariifolia var. longipes is a variety of the Veronica plant, also known as speedwell, which is a type of flowering plant in the plantain family (Plantaginaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Veronica cymbalariifolia var. longipes are said to include relieving respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as reducing fever and inflammation. The plant can be prepared as a tea by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water, or it can be made into a tincture by extracting the plant's active compounds in a solvent.
